items.briefing:
Small businesses should be on alert for ransomware scammers impersonating Interpol, attempting to pressure victims into paying by posing as a legitimate law enforcement agency. Separately, a social engineering technique called ClickFix — which tricks users into running malicious commands by pretending to fix a problem — has now spread to Mac computers, meaning Apple users are no longer safer by default.

A practical reminder: if you receive any unexpected message claiming to be from a government or law enforcement agency demanding payment or urgent action, do not respond — contact the agency directly using contact details from their official website.

featured.title: Yahoo Boys, a persistent menace and one of the longest running online crime cultures
featured.quote: Yahoo Boys evolving into AI-enabled cybercrime poses significant threat to Australian businesses and individuals.
